subcodes.first_line: A letter was sent forth in response to His Excellency, which assuredly hath by now reached its destination [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ای بحضرت اجل از پیش در جواب ارسال گشت البته تا بحال رسیده است جمیع احزاب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
